My skin is made to tell a beautifully unique story and my spots and scars are part of that story!

settings.heading: Let's keep it real.
settings.subheading: Sign up for our newsletter for self care tips, acne 101, fun community surprises and more. We love bluming with you!

settings.title: Hey Skimm'rs. Nice to meet you, we're Blume.
settings.description: Exclusively for you, Skimm'rs! Get 15% towards your purchase with code THESKIMM at checkout.

settings.title: Setting a new standard for sensitive and acne-prone skin.

settings.about_title_1: Derm Tested, Certified Clean at Sephora & Conscious Beauty at ULTA
settings.about_description_1: We formulate with some of the top labs in North America that make your favourite, often much more expensive products. We focus on A+ formulas, over packaging, so we can pass on the value to YOU, and focus on making effective formulas. We always formulate with sensitive and acne-prone skin in mind and champion healthy skin, and easy to follow daily routines.
settings.about_title_2: Gentle ingredients that help you feel strong
settings.about_description_2: Breakouts happen! Blume strives to help you feel more confident in your skin, everyday. We've all experienced the messages in the beauty industry making us feel we are not enough - and Blume wants to be antidote to this and strengthen the voice in your head that knows you are enough. Nothing makes our team happier than when we see your reviews, your real results and how Blume has helped you experience healthy, hydrated, clear skin.
settings.about_title_3: Periods and puberty should never affect potential
settings.about_description_3: Here at Blume, everything we do is with and for our community. A portion of proceeds from each sale goes to @daysforgirls- an organization that turns periods into pathways for girls around the world through proper education + access to safe resources.
settings.about_description_4:
Growing up, Taran and Bunny, struggled with acne and sensitive skin. We tried countless products, wasted money, and nothing seemed to work. All we wanted was clear skin and the confidence that comes with it. Most existing solutions were complicated, harsh on our skin, and left us with scarring and feeling sad.

Our breakthrough came when we discovered the power of all-natural ingredients in our routine, like those in our Meltdown oil. Focusing on anti-inflammatory and clean ingredients, this inspired us to create Blume, a line that truly understands and caters to sensitive, acne-prone skin with products that are both gentle and highly effective.

We want everyone to enjoy clear skin without compromise. Most importantly, we want you to know that you are not alone in your skincare journey. We hope Blume is the last acne product you ever try, just as it was for us and 500,000+ Blume customers.

settings.title: Leave Hormonal Acne Behind and Get Clear Skin

60% of women say their self-esteem dropped during puberty.

Our mission is to change that.
Why we're focused on healthy skin, not perfect skin
settings.stat_1_description: Define beauty as having clear skin
settings.stat_2_description: Say someone in their life has made them feel ashamed of their acne
settings.stat_3_description: Don’t feel confident without makeup during acne breakouts
settings.stat_4_description: Miss social events due to facial acne

settings.title: PROUDLY WOC FOUNDED
settings.description: Sisters Taran and Bunny co-founded Blume when they realized how hard it was to access period care online and how weird the world treats normal things like periods and puberty.

settings.title: CLEAN INGREDIENTS
settings.description: We like to keep things transparent, starting with our ingredient lists. Our skin, body and period care are Clean Certified—no mystery ingredients or things we can't pronounce.

settings.title: COMMUNITY CURATED
settings.description: Our products are made with you, for you! From surveys to sample testing and everything in between, we wouldn't be here without you.

settings.title: CLIMATE NEUTRAL CERTIFIED
settings.description: We’re committed to taking immediate + actionable steps towards reducing our carbon footprint. Includes offsetting all the emissions it takes to produce and ship products.

settings.title: Meet Blume. We’re all up in your bathroom.
settings.description: We believe in protecting and nurturing your skin barrier—never damaging. That’s why we don’t drop new products weekly (or even monthly). Truth is, the process is longer to really make them good for your body + the environment. We wouldn’t want it any other way!

settings.title: Made with nature’s best ingredients
settings.subTitle: Our products’ transparent ingredient lists allow you to know what’s going on your skin and in your body. Literally.

settings.description_1:
One of the first things that sparked Taran + Bunny to create Blume was realizing how many young people weren’t able to go to school because of their periods.

A portion of proceeds from *every* Blume.com sale goes to @daysforgirls—an organization that turns periods into pathways for girls around the world thru proper education + access to safe resources. Thank you for lifting us up through Blume so we can continue lifting others across communities <3
settings.educate_description: Everyone deserves to feel prepared for their first period. Download our real life guide to first periods, backed by Dr. Lori Brotto (Executive Director of the Women’s Health Institute) and several sexual health educators, that covers everything a girl needs to know!

settings.title: Self care is an art and our boxes are masterpieces
settings.description: What goes on your body, goes in your body. That’s why we make going natural second nature.

settings.heading: Ready to get rewarded?
settings.subheading: Let’s make it official. Join our loyalty program today and earn merch, free products and more on the way to Blumetopia.

settings.heading: Get Points
settings.Description:
It’s free to join, and you score your first Blume Bucks just for signing up. Already have a Blume account? Sign in and start earning!



Earn by shopping, leaving reviews, engaging with us on social media — the opportunities are endless. Stack up those points and cash ‘em in for big rewards.

settings.heading: Start by earning BBs
settings.description: Earning Blume Bucks is easy. Get them whenever you shop. Plus, earn bonus BBs for fun things like being our friend on social, telling friends about Blume, and having a birthday (achievable, right?).

settings.heading: Redeem your BBs for divine prizes
Reaching Blumetopia
settings.description: Reach Full Blume to receive exclusive perks, such as a birthday gift and access to special promotions! Becoming part of the Blume Club is easy and free. The more Blume Bucks you earn the more you Blume!

settings.heading: Give $10, Get $10
settings.description: Already sharing your love for Blume with your besties? May as well get something in return. Refer a friend and give them $10 toward their first Blume purchase. You’ll get $10 towards your next purchase, too!

settings.description: More About Meltdown

settings.review: I love Blume and all their products because of how SIMPLE the ingredient lists are. No funky chemicals that you can’t pronounce. Just real, good-for-you and your body ingredients that work! The Stargirl mist has been a go-to of mine for the winter, it gives the most natural glow while hydrating as well! Can’t recommend it enough!
settings.name: Sasha (@whattthehealth)

settings.review: I have very sensitive skin so always prefer to find and use products with natural ingredients that I can trust and aren’t too harsh. I had been trying to find a good natural spot treatment and then I discovered Meltdown! I’ve been loving it and even got my boyfriend hooked.
settings.name: Chiara (@chilucchetta)

settings.review: Traditional acne treatments often dry out my skin and cause more problems than I started with, but I finally found a solution with Blume Stargirl! Not only does it fight off acne, it’s amazing at preventing breakouts in the first place. 10/10 recommend.
settings.name: Dorothy (@dskyeung)

settings.review: Meltdown is my true go-to when it comes to any little blemish that tries to make its debut! Meltdown is the spot acne treatment that will help you out whenever you need it and it has proved its worth to keep its place in my skin care routine.
settings.name: Amber (@amber__roman)

settings.review: Everything changed once I discovered Hug Me! Honestly, wholeheartedly, I can say it works! I have worn Hug Me while I’m just watching Netflix, and while doing intense workout classes, and I didn’t smell for any of it! It also holds up SO WELL! I’m so excited, I’ll never go back to what I was using ever again!
settings.name: Grace (@withgrace.blog)

settings.review: The skin care products were awesome!!
settings.name: Mavia (@mavianijjer)

settings.heading: Period Products
settings.description: Get your first month of a Blume tampon subscription for only $5! Use Code: FIRSTBOX

settings.heading: Blume Organic Tampons
settings.props: 100% organic cotton | Bioplastic applicator | BPA free | No pesticides, bleach or chlorine | No mystery ingredients | 5 years to degrade

settings.heading: Conventional Tampons
settings.props: May contain bleach, chlorine or pesticides | Tough plastic applicator | Contains synthetic fibers & woodpulp | Uses odor neutralizers & fragrance | 500+ years to degrade

settings.text: Try your first month for only $5
Starting next month, your tampons or pads will come automatically. No need to go to the store! Regular price: $8 for pads / $10 for tampons

settings.author: Nancy S
settings.heading: Smooth
settings.description: Easy to insert, and absorbent! Didn't really experience any trouble with these, and I like knowing everything is fully 100% biodegradable.

settings.author: Rylee F
settings.heading: Will never go back to regular tampons
settings.description: I tried blume's organic tampons last month and I will never go back to drug store brands after learning about all the chemicals and dyes that are used. They are also super comfortable with an easy application. One box lasted me my full period. Highly recommend!

settings.author: Hannah L
settings.heading: Autoship Lifesaver
settings.description: I love having tampons come automatically each month. It saves me from having to make an emergency trip to the store. I also love that they are made with organic materials and I feel better about what I’m putting into my body.

settings.heading: Meltdown Oil for Acne-Prone Skin
settings.description:
This top selling oil for acne-prone skin is made from a powerful blend of clean ingredients to clear skin, without compromising hydration. Meltdown is made with powerful ingredients to make acne disappear, fast.

It’s the five-star oil for acne-prone skin that never leaves you feeling dry or oily—just healthy, hydrated, and clear. Spot treat or mix into your moisturizer for full-face coverage.

settings.heading: Milky Fade Spot and Scar Fade Serum
settings.description: Spots and scars can be tricky to fade - that’s why we made this milky serum that works hard, and quickly too. This lightweight serum fades the look of stubborn acne scars and spots, while restoring the skin barrier. Packed with natural actives like niacinamide, licorice and tiger grass, this fast-acting fade serum repairs overall complexion and reduces scars through the day, and overnight.
